s1.title: Wall System
s1.description: Qingtai precision wall systems combine high-strength steel framing with versatile gypsum boards.

s2.title: Ceiling System
s2.description: Including aluminum baffles, mineral wool panels, and gypsum ceilings—practical and beautiful solutions for commercial and industrial spaces.

s3.title: Special Board System
s3.description: Special boards engineered for extreme environments: moisture-proof, mold-resistant, radiation-shielding, and ultra-hard options.

p1.title: Shanghai Tower Interior Partition Project
p1.description: This project used our high-strength steel framing system and A-class fire-resistant gypsum boards, covering over 50,000 m², achieving industry-leading seismic and fire performance in supertall buildings.

p2.title: Beijing Daxing International Airport Terminal Ceiling
p2.description: We delivered customized aluminum baffle ceiling systems with special fluorocarbon coating to ensure durability and aesthetics in high-traffic public spaces.

p3.title: Marina Bay Sands Hotel Expansion
p3.description: We provided complete acoustic and finishing solutions to meet the hotel’s high requirements for privacy and design aesthetics.

home.badge: Wataalamu wa vifaa vya ujenzi, miaka 20
home.heroDesc1: Qingtai hutoa mifumo ya fremu, bodi na kumalizia ya alumini ya kiwango cha dunia.
home.heroDesc2: Kwa utengenezaji sahihi na usafirishaji wa kimataifa, tunaunga mkono maono yako.

cart.title: Orodha ya manunuzi

empty.title: Orodha yako iko tupu
empty.desc: Bado hujaongeza vifaa vyovyote kwenye orodha ya manunuzi.

summary.title: Muhtasari wa gharama
summary.fillFirst: Tafadhali jaza nchi/bandari ya mwisho, njia ya ununuzi, na mawasiliano yote upande wa kushoto kwanza.

cart.hint: Kidokezo: jaza taarifa zote zinazohitajika kisha thibitisha. Mfumo hautatoa nukuu kiotomatiki wakati unaandika. Baada ya kuthibitisha, oda itaundwa na nukuu ya USD itaonekana upande wa kulia.
cart.waitingQuote: Taarifa za lazima zimekamilika. Bofya “Thibitisha na tuma oda” upande wa kushoto. Baada ya kufanikiwa, hapa utaona maelezo ya USD kulingana na CBM na yatasawazishwa kwenye Oda za Admin.
cart.agreementNote: Kutuma kunamaanisha umekubali Mkataba wa Ununuzi wa Vifaa. Kubadilisha taarifa yoyote upande wa kushoto kutafuta nukuu hii na kuhitaji kuthibitisha tena.

specs.title: Vipimo
specs.empty: Hakuna vipimo vilivyoorodheshwa. Tafadhali wasiliana nasi kwa maelezo.
